Colerain to Salineville Line 73 Valve Section 1 Isolation -- COMPLETE


Notice Text:

Texas Eastern has completed the previously posted Line 73 Colerain to Salineville Valve Section 1 isolation ahead of schedule, and the line has returned to normal operations. Effective immediately all restrictions associated with this outage have been lifted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.


BackPrint
